reviews.comment: Coffee Island at Phoenix Mall never disappoints. From the aroma of freshly brewed coffee to the comfortable seating and pleasant ambience, everything feels just right. The staff is courteous and quick with service. A perfect spot to unwind, catch up with friends, or enjoy some me-time with a great cup of coffee.

reviewReply.comment: Great to hear the coffee, ambience, and service left such a strong impression. We appreciate you taking the time to share this and hope to see you again soon.

reviews.comment: Such a beautiful cafe, inspired by nature love their atmosphere, warm welcoming with a big smile of their staff. Everything was just perfect. Food and the coffee was also nice. Highly recommend👍

reviews.comment: Me and my brother visited this place, had an amazing time here the staff were very helpful and hardworking and always had a pleasant smile on their face. Especially Mr. Fazal helped us through out to choose special picks from their menu.
